summary: Testing of password reset flow fix for Hönsgården app. Backend API endpoints for 6-digit code password reset are fully working. Mobile app (Expo/React Native) frontend has been updated with complete code verification UI. Web frontend at /api/web still uses older reset link flow (out of scope for mobile app fix).

issues: Web frontend still shows 'Skicka återställningslänk' (send reset link) instead of the new 6-digit code flow. The mobile app (login.tsx) has been properly updated but the React webapp_dist was not rebuilt. This is minor as the main focus was on the mobile app.

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Backend endpoint POST /api/auth/forgot-password correctly returns code_sent: true for existing users with password auth
✓ Backend endpoint POST /api/auth/verify-reset-code correctly validates 6-digit codes with attempt limiting (5 max)
✓ Backend endpoint POST /api/auth/reset-password-with-code correctly resets password with valid token
✓ Mobile app login.tsx has complete UI for 6-digit code entry with auto-focus between digits
✓ authStore.ts has verifyResetCode and resetPasswordWithCode functions implemented correctly
✓ Email sending via Resend API is working (password reset code emails sent successfully)
Note: The Expo app's main frontend at root URL has JavaScript compatibility issue ('import.meta' error) but this appears to be an existing Metro bundling issue, not related to the password reset fix

success_rate.frontend: N/A (Expo app rendering issue unrelated to password reset code changes)

seed_data_creation: Created test users during pytest runs with TEST_ prefix for cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password reset flow backend fully tested. Mobile app frontend (login.tsx) has been updated with 6-digit code verification UI. The web frontend at /api/web still uses older reset link flow - would need webapp_dist to be rebuilt if that also needs the new flow. Expo app has 'import.meta' JavaScript error causing blank page on web - this is a pre-existing Metro bundling issue.

POST /api/auth/forgot-password.behavior: Returns code_sent: true for existing users, code_sent: false for non-existent users (security-safe)

POST /api/auth/verify-reset-code.behavior: Validates 6-digit code, limits to 5 attempts, returns token on success

POST /api/auth/reset-password-with-code.behavior: Validates token (10 min expiry), requires 6+ char password, updates password hash

login.tsx_authMode_states: 'login' - Email/password login form with 'Glömt lösenord?' link
'verify-code' - 6-digit code input (6 separate TextInput fields with auto-focus)
mobile_app_ui_verification.code_verified: All auth mode states and corresponding UI elements present in login.tsx
